channel.title: Permacomputing on permanent-shadow
channel.description: Recent content in Permacomputing on permanent-shadow

item.title: Norns
item.description: What is this magic? The monome norns has been a magical little music box that combines my diy desires with built in functionality. If you aren’t already familiar with this little device, it won’t take much to find a cornicopia of videos displaying it’s swiss army knife approach to music creation. I won’t go over every detail of it but essentially it can be described as a music computer that sneezes in the face of planned obsellesence.
